no: Morpheus562's Kitpack Adds some kits inspired by D&D 5e like the Fighter (Psi Warrior) and other kits inspired by Neverwinter Nights 2 like the Stormlord (Fighter/Druid).

advisories.reason: Mechanism-verified, failure NOT observed in any preserved WSETUP.DEBUG across our test cycles. Both mods are by morpheus562. Trace: Stormlord (cn:1101) creates MOSTL02.SPL in override. mih_metamod cn:4 'Clean up override folder' moves .SPL files into mh#clean.bif and removes them from override/ (verified: cleanup_override.tpa preserve list excludes .spl). EPS initialize.tpa:1345 does COPY_EXISTING ~MOSTL02.SPL~ override when Stormlord is detected; WeiDU should resolve this from the biff. No install has produced 'Resource [MOSTL02.SPL] not found'. Mirror of the advisory on enhanced-powergaming-scripts. If you observe the failure in a real install, report the session ID and we'll promote both sides to confirmed.
advisories.source: Demoted to advisories[] on 2026-04-21 during same-author audit. Mirror of enhanced-powergaming-scripts.advisories[morpheus562skitpack].

activated.effects: Double APR for 5 rounds, then winded.

At lv5, attackers take 1d4 piercing

activated.effects: +10% damage, immunities, but -2 AC, 1 dmg/round self, +10% physical damage taken. 1 turn. Winded after.

activated.effects: Swordshattering, Razorice, or Fallen Champion rune.

new: Two-handed weapon expert who wreaks havoc on the battlefield with powerful cleaving attacks.
Assigns the Battlerager kit to Korgan.
Battlerager: Do NOT assign to Korgan
Keeps Korgan with his default Berserker kit.
Dwarven berserker entering uncontrollable battle rage. Raw fury and toughness.
Fallen warrior wielding dark powers. Undead abilities and fear aura.
Elite warrior dedicated to a cause. Enhanced combat prowess and leadership.
Warrior dedicated to polearm combat. Charging attacks and reach weapon mastery.
Fighter augmenting physical might with psi-infused abilities. Telekinetic strikes and mental shields.
Specialized fighter whose purpose is destroying enemy defenses. Sunder abilities.
Assigns the Deathbringer kit to Sarevok.
Deathbringer: Do NOT assign to Sarevok
Keeps Sarevok with his default kit.
Dark warrior of Bhaal trained in lethal combat arts. Death-dealing strikes.
Assigns the Rashemaar Berserker kit to Minsc.
Rashemaar Berserker: Do NOT assign to Minsc
Keeps Minsc with his default Ranger kit.
Legendary Rashemi defender. Spirit-fueled berserker rage and endurance.
Ranger champion embodying discipline and quickness in wilderness combat.
Paladin dedicated to fighting supernatural evil. Bonus vs fiends and undead.
Favored knight defending the faith. Enhanced divine combat abilities.
Evil warrior reveling in death and destruction. Vampiric strikes and fear.
Fallen paladin who broke sacred oaths. Dark powers from broken divine bonds.
Revised Blackguard with enhanced dark abilities and evil paladin features.
Neutral paladin balancing good and evil. Flexible alignment with modified abilities.
Eastern martial artist wielding wind-based ki powers. Ranged ki strikes and wind abilities.
Powerful spellcaster dedicated to the art of magic. Enhanced arcane power and spell mastery.
Assigns the Eldritch Scion kit to Xan.
Assigns the Eldritch Scion kit to Xan.
Eldritch Scion: Do NOT assign to NPC
Does not assign the Eldritch Scion kit to any NPC.
Sorcerer combining innate magic with martial combat. Spell-sword fighter.
Assigns the Stormlord kit to Jaheira.
Assigns the Stormlord kit to Jaheira.
Stormlord: Do NOT assign to Jaheira
Keeps Jaheira with her default Fighter/Druid kit.
Fighter/Druid wielding thunder and lightning like a warrior wields a sword.
Multi-class variant of the Nightcloak of Shar. Shadow divine magic with fighter combat.

sum: 33 kits across fighters, rangers, paladins, clerics, mages, monks, and multiclass. Includes NPC kit assignments for Korgan, Sarevok, Minsc, Xan, and Jaheira.

co.no: Battle Master fighter kit. Grandmastery only in two-handed weapons. Charge (speed boost) at lv1, Relentless Assault (double APR for 5 rounds, then winded) at lv4.

co.n: Battlerager: Do NOT assign to Korgan
co.no: Installs Battlerager kit without assigning to Korgan.
co.tp2n: Do NOT assign kit to Korgan

co.no: Battlerager dwarf fighter kit. Reckless melee combatant with spiked armor and damage bonuses while enraged. Dwarf-only, non-lawful.
Death Knight fighter kit. Dark warrior with unholy magic — weapon runes, unholy blight, minion summoning. Evil-only, no dual-classing.
Dragoon fighter kit. Mobile lance/spear specialist with charge attacks and mounted combat bonuses.
Psi Warrior fighter kit. Intelligence-based fighter channeling psionic energy for damage bonuses and mental barriers. CON penalty.
Sarevok cannot dual-class with this kit

co.n: Deathbringer: Do NOT assign to Sarevok
co.tp2n: Do NOT assign kit to Sarevok

co.no: Assigns Rashemaar Berserker ranger kit to Minsc. Frenzy-based warrior from Rashemen with combat rage bonuses. Human-only.

co.n: Rashemaar Berserker: Do NOT assign to Minsc
